headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Most cutest cats Ever! 🥹"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Opinion: Overqualified applicant (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: I’d place my life in those tiny, velvet paws
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-03-12)
